content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.37%, Bank Nifty -0.76%, India VIX +2.35% to 17 — mild risk-off undertone but sector rotation is alive: IT (+0.92%), Pharma (+0.53%), Auto (+0.11%) green; Bank/Energy/Metal red. Strong stock-specific Q4 print rally across COFORGE, LUPIN, WOCKPHARMA, NAVINFLUOR, SRF, PIDILITIND, MARICO, ABCAPITAL — earnings season delivering alpha. Existing book is +1.6% on day with multiple positions in profit; priority is to trail SLs aggressively to lock the gains, not stack new entries on a 63%-deployed book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.5% gain, CMP 1087.60. Current SL 1066.24 is below entry-buffer; trailing to 1055 (~3% below CMP) locks in ~+7.2% minimum. Q4 PAT +19% YoY beat; momentum bullish but stock approaching 52w high 1141.90 and Marketsmojo flagged exhaustion. 1055 gives ~3% breathing room above today's intraday low cluster while protecting the bulk of the gain. Trail-gap discipline: 1055 is 3.0% below CMP, well above the 1% floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive position -0.6%, gold bid +1.67% today on VIX spike. SL 121.00 (~2.7% below CMP) and target 135 still valid. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already at SL 4725.56 (~1.4% below CMP 4794.40 — at the trail-gap floor). +4.8% gain, defense theme intact, new CMD + GE engine catalyst. Holding existing SL — no change. (Emitting MODIFY with same values violates no-op rule; switching to HOLD.)"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1% gain, CMP 7045 vs SL 6960 (~1.2% below CMP — at trail-gap floor already). Q4 blockbuster (PAT +124%) digested; near 52w high 7200. Tightening further would risk self-stopout on normal noise. Hold current SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 840.60, +0.3%. Current SL 836 is uncomfortably tight (0.5% below CMP, below the 1% trail-gap floor — practically guaranteed stopout on noise). Loosening SL is REJECTED by guardrail (cannot loosen). Re-checking: 836 is the stored SL. Cannot loosen. Will EXIT instead if SL inappropriate — but Q4 setup is intact post 13% surge May-5 with metro orderbook. Better path: leave SL as-is and let it trigger if support breaks; do NOT loosen. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, CMP 366.35 vs SL 365 (~0.4% below — tight but already placed at entry). Q4 PAT +30.6%, lending crossed Rs 2 lakh cr — thesis intact. Letting SL act as designed; no new info to justify exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3%, current SL=entry=820 (1.5% below CMP 832.90). Q4 revenue +22% YoY, FMCG defensive bid. SL already at breakeven — no-op MODIFY, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1320.00,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.8% gain, CMP 1350.50. Current SL 1329.47 is 1.55% below CMP — already within trail-gap floor. Q4 PAT +124%, +30% revenue growth, 5 large deals, executable orderbook USD 1.75B. Proposed 1320 is BELOW current SL 1329.47 — cannot loosen. Holding existing SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.0%, CMP 3059.30, SL=entry=3025 (1.1% below CMP — at trail-gap floor). Defense up-cycle intact. SL already at breakeven; no improvement available without breaching trail-gap. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.2% gain, CMP 844.05 vs SL 827.41 (~2% below CMP). Q4 PAT +10.88%, record SIPs Rs 32K cr/month support thesis. SL placement appropriate — locks ~+2.6% minimum while giving room to target 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, CMP 1480 vs SL 1445 (~2.4% below). Q4 PAT +36.6%, EBITDA margin +280bps best-in-class. Stock surged +8.49% today on Q4 print — within normal post-result intraday chop. Thesis fully intact; SL absorbs noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, CMP 2439.10 vs SL 2400 (~1.6% below). Q4 PAT +87.5% YoY, US sales +56.9%, gRavicti USFDA approval, dividend Rs 18 — strong. Concall TODAY (May 8) is a catalyst, not a binary tail; full-size hold acceptable given quality of Q4 print. SL absorbs concall chop."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.8% gain, CMP 1618.40. Current SL 1545 is 4.5% below CMP — too loose now that position is in profit. Trailing to 1580 (2.4% below CMP, above 1% floor) tightens risk while preserving the Zaynich/biotech thesis. Q4 swing-to-profit story intact. R from 1580→target 1740 = 38 reward vs 38 risk — wait, recalc: from CMP-perspective new SL is 1580, target 1740, so reward 121 / risk 38 = 3.2x at CMP. Good."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 14,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 2785.00,
      "stop_loss": 2700.00,
      "target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 FY26: PAT +10.6% Q4 / FY26 PAT +46.7%. Stock +10.43% today on heavy buying through Rs 2700 resistance. Specialty chemicals breakout day with NAVINFLUOR/PIDILITIND in tow. Position size: 14 shares × 2785 = Rs 38,990 (~3.85% of capital). Risk: (2785-2700)/2785 = 3.05% × 3.85% = 0.117% of portfolio — well within 0.5% per-name budget. R:R = 135/85 = 1.59 ≥ 1.5. Cluster check: NAVINFLUOR + PIDILITIND already held in Chemicals; SRF would be 3rd Chemicals name — at the cluster cap, but combined weight ~10% of capital still leaves headroom. Brokerage views split (Citi/Jefferies/MS Sell) is the main caveat — sized small to reflect that. No binary event in next 3 sessions (Q4 just printed). No governance overhang."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1055.00, "reasoning": "Lock +7.2% minimum while preserving room toward 52w high test."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL/target intact."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 4725.56 already at trail-gap floor (1.4% below CMP); further tightening = self-stopout risk."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 6960 ~1.2% below CMP — at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 836 tight but cannot loosen; let it work or let SL fire on broken setup."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 365 placed at entry; thesis intact post Q4 +30.6% PAT."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (820); proposed equals stored — no-op avoided."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1329.47 already 1.55% below CMP — at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 3025 at breakeven, 1.1% below CMP — at floor."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 827.41 locks +2.6%; positional momentum healthy."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 +36.6% PAT just printed; let SL 1445 absorb post-result chop."},
    {"symbol": "LUPIN", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Concall today is catalyst; SL 2400 absorbs normal volatility."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Tighten loose 4.5% SL to 2.4% now that position in profit."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong Q4 setups passed on: COFORGE re-add (already held; no add), HAL add (already held +4.8%, sector cap concern), TATATECH (multiple Sell ratings TPs 25-30% below CMP — research disqualifier), THERMAX (not deep-data this batch), POLYCAB/FINCABLES/BHARATFORG (BHARATFORG already has open LIMIT @2015, no stack — Order Hygiene rule). INDUSINDBK explicitly skipped per Rule 13 (governance overhang from prior SFIO/SEBI matter not confirmed cleared). LAURUSLABS, KPIL, GABRIEL, SOBHA — interesting but cluster/sector caps already engaged. SRF added as the cleanest Q4-print breakout meeting R:R + sector budget.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 63%, Cash 37% — soft target 80% allows ~17% more deployment headroom; SRF add takes us to ~67%. Earnings-season win-rate is showing in unrealized P&L (+15K). Priority for the rest of the session: monitor LUPIN concall (today) and existing winners; do NOT stack more cluster-correlated entries (already 3 chemicals names, 2 financial services, 2 capital goods, 2 pharma post-LUPIN). 5-day rolling win rate 15% is poor — proves the 'small wins, similarly-sized losses' problem; the trail-SL discipline today is the corrective. VIX +2.35% notes risk-off undertone — keep capital reserve."
}
